title: USDH on Hyperliquid with Sky
summary_title: Decentralized stablecoins beat centralized custodians—Sky's 4.85% yield on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Rune from Sky explains why USDH needs governance-first infrastructure, parallel deployments, and diversified collateral beyond T-bills.

key_moments.label: Rune introduces Sky's vision and stablecoin philosophy
Origin story: lost everything in 2011 Bitcoin crash, co-founded Maker
Why decentralized money matters: transparency, no counterparty risk
Sky's governance tools and star agents framework explained
Using Hyperliquid native collateral: HLP, purpose positions, LSTs
USDH proposal: liquidity, existing rails, 4.85% yield promise
Spark protocol launch and free access for normal users
Final call: support Sky proposal, explore star agents and Spark

pull_quote: The whole point of crypto is it delivers better infrastructure that makes it easier for people to be completely sure they're not getting ripped off by counterparties and their assets are safe.
